summary: Authenticated users get a server-verified local user profile and free or paid dashboard status.

steps.mint_appwrite_jwt: AuthContext creates an Appwrite JWT for the current session.
steps.verify_api_identity: /api/billing/status verifies the JWT with Appwrite before trusting the caller.
steps.upsert_local_user: The API creates or updates public.users from verified Appwrite account data.
steps.derive_plan_status: The API checks latest Stripe subscriptions and sets users.plan_status to paid only for active or trialing subscriptions.
steps.return_local_user_profile: The API returns the local users row fields needed by the dashboard, including id, Appwrite id, email, name, plan status, Stripe customer id, and timestamps.
steps.render_dashboard_status: Dashboard displays the returned free or paid state in the General section with the verified local user information.

conditions: Unauthenticated or invalid JWT requests must return 401.
Missing Stripe customer or subscription data must display free.
Billing status must not be accepted from client-controlled request bodies.
Dashboard user details from SQL must only come from the server response after Appwrite JWT verification.
